raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX I ordered XXXX thermostats from " XXXX XXXX '' ( website - https : //www.poweredbyefi.org/masssave/ ) for a total of {$39.00} and charged the total to my Citi Bank Credit Card XXXX The order number from my email receipt is # XXXX. 

Shortly after I decided to cancel the order which I did over the phone and when I check my online account currently, I see that it lists the order as having been refunded with a refund number of # XXXX. 

The problem is that the refund never made it back to my credit card. I called " XXXX XXXX '' and they insist that they issued a refund and to check with Citi Bank. I called Citi Bank and had to open a dispute ( dispute # XXXX ). Unfortunately they did not appear to understand the issue and they just closed the dispute without even contacting me. I called back to complain so they forwarded my dispute to another department to be audited. They keep telling me that they are " continuing to work with the merchant to obtain credit '' but this has been going on for months now. 

My last contact with Citi Bank was on XX/XX/XXXX. I spoke to " XXXX '' and was told that the case is still open and that she would request a status update which would take XXXX days. I never heard back and I have not contacted Citi Bank about the issue again since then.
